race.comment: Very open race to launch Oaks Day. EXPRESS PAYMENT (13) appreciated the step up to 1600m and was a shade too strong in a BM78 at Doomben a fortnight ago. Failed at his only try over this distance but it was at the end of last prep. Nicely in with 3.5kgs less today and another win looks on the cards. Forget the last run of ROTAGILLA (4) on a bog track over 2000m. Won a BM94 at Randwick over this distance three back then was only 1.6 lengths away in the $500k The Coast at Listed level the run after. Has won three from five at this trip and can add to that tally here. KALUAKOI (11) has led all the way to win two of his three starts this campaign. A wide gate won't bother him. Going well enough to test this field. CAVALRY MAN (17) has been about the mark all prep including a third in a similar race here two back. Solid each-way chance down on the limit. GALANO (9) had no luck behind KALUAKOI a fortnight ago. Gets in well this time and will enjoy a dream run from gate one.
